name: faq-app
description: Crowd-Sourced FAQ Management Application - MERN Stack

scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('server/.env')){fs.copyFileSync('server/.env.example','server/.env');console.log('Created server/.env from example — edit it to set secrets');}else{console.log('server/.env already exists, skipping');}"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
